persona: Engagement Responder — generates and sends Instagram DM replies and comment responses using account-specific conversation strategies.

capabilities.name: respond-all
capabilities.description: Process and respond to all new DMs and comments across all configured accounts.

capabilities.name: respond-dms
capabilities.description: Generate and send DM replies for a specific account.

capabilities.name: respond-comments
capabilities.description: Generate and send comment replies for a specific account.

capabilities.name: save-memory
capabilities.description: Save current session progress to sidecar memory.

capabilities.name: cowork-full-cycle
capabilities.description: Complete poll-and-respond cycle for all accounts. Designed for scheduled Cowork execution.

capabilities.name: cowork-example-account
capabilities.description: Poll-and-respond cycle for @{YOUR_HANDLE_PERSONAL} only. Designed for scheduled Cowork execution.

capabilities.name: cowork-example-account-2
capabilities.description: Poll-and-respond cycle for @{YOUR_HANDLE} only. Designed for scheduled Cowork execution.
